objective: Refactor generated L-system/space-filling module smoke tests into behavior/responsibility subfolders and extract a shared smoke-test behavior contract without changing module coverage.

Moved algae/ABOP/plant tests into botanical_lsystems and validated category.
Moved canopy/tree/coral/cactus/fern tests into tree_canopies and validated category.
